news.t: Victory Portfolios II To Transfer Listing of Six ETFs to Nasdaq

holdings.infoBox: UEVM is an equity ETF with a total of 202 individual holdings. The top holdings are Lenovo Group stock at 1.50%, Bank of China at 1.27%, Yageo at 1.24%, SD Guthrie Berhad at 1.14%, and RHB Bank Berhad at 1.13%.

overview.description: The VictoryShares Emerging Markets Value Momentum ETF (UEVM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a multi-factor-selected, volatility-weighted index of stocks from emerging economies. UEVM was launched on Oct 24, 2017 and is issued by VictoryShares.
infoTable: Nasdaq Victory Emerging Market Value Momentum Index

holdings.n: Industrial and Commercial Bank of China Limited

data.title: Victory Portfolios II To Transfer Listing of Six ETFs to Nasdaq
data.text: SAN ANTONIO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Victory Portfolios II today announced plans to transfer the listing of six ETFs from NYSE to Nasdaq on or around November 1, 2022.
